name: pm-decision-kit
description: Decision-grade PM skills: specs, roadmaps, metrics, research synthesis, competitive briefs, stakeholder comms, assumption mapping, red-teaming, and a chained launch-decision workflow — all driven by a single pluggable company-context file.
